title: ResearchAction
description: Audit-log row for records/research_actions.jsonl. This stream records local workflow actions such as adding sources, importing extraction packets, and running graph-linking commands.

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp for when the action was recorded.

action.description: Stable action name. Existing actions include add_source, ingest_url, import_extraction, and link_names; keep this open for new workflow commands.

details.description: Command-specific payload. Prefer source_ids, record IDs, paths relative to the case root, and compact counts over prose-only notes.
